claim: For a 1048579-element fp32 sum on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, block-local reduction with one atomic per block measured 15.258674x faster than the per-element atomic baseline using HIP-event timing only.
curation_note: timing-only awkward-size sweep: HIP-event timings and correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected because rocprof, rocprofv3, rocminfo, and rocm-smi were unavailable in this Windows venv environment. This record avoids the rejected 16777219-element FP32 exact-integer tolerance trap.
